betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6RBMK§f (Reaktor Bolshoy Moshchnosti Kanalniy) is a modular boiling-water reactor.

§eTask Requirements:§f
• §bRBMK Fuel Rod§f
• §bRBMK Outgasser§f
• §bRBMK Lid§f (x2)
• §bRa-226/Be Fuel§f

§eCore Mechanics:§f
• Generates §bneutron flux§f based on fuel type and moderators
• §bControl rods§f absorb flux to regulate reaction
• Heat converts water to steam directly in fuel channels

§eSafety:§f
§c§4MELTDOWN§f if core exceeds §c2500°C§f!
• Use outgassers to vent xenon poisoning
• Monitor temperatures constantly

§eComponents:§f
• §bModerators§f - Amplify flux for more power
• §bAbsorbers§f - Reduce flux for safety
• §bOutgassers§f - Vent xenon buildup
• §bLids§f - Seal the reactor top

§aTip:§f Start small, understand flux mechanics before scaling up.
